utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh my God , oh my God ! Poor Monica !

emotion_cause.span: 7_He thinks Monica is empty , she is the empty vase !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: He was with her when he wrote this poem .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Look , My vessel so empty with nothing inside .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Now that I have touched you , you seem emptier still .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: He thinks Monica is empty , she is the empty vase !

emotion_cause.span: 7_He thinks Monica is empty , she is the empty vase !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , totally . Oh , God , oh , she seemed so happy too .

emotion_cause.span: 7_He thinks Monica is empty , she is the empty vase !
